book_title_en: Social Science Part-1: History and Political Science

chapters.title_en: Establishment of British Rule in India

topics.title_en: British East India Company's arrival and early settlements
objectives: Understand the reasons for British arrival in India
Identify major events leading to British dominance

topics.title_en: Expansion of British power and administrative policies
objectives: Analyze early British administrative structures

topics.title_en: Causes and early phases of the national movement
objectives: Explain the factors contributing to Indian nationalism

topics.title_en: Rise of prominent leaders and organizations
objectives: Describe the roles of key leaders in the freedom struggle
Summarize the main phases and strategies of the national movement
Understand the process of India's independence and partition

chapters.title_en: Establishment of Post-Independence Rule in India

objectives: Identify the immediate challenges faced by independent India
Explain the process of integrating princely states
Describe the key features of the Indian Constitution
Analyze India's economic policies after independence
Discuss major social changes and reforms
Understand the principles of India's foreign policy

chapters.title_en: Establishment of Democratic Rule in India

objectives: Explain the functioning of India's democratic system
Describe the electoral process and role of political parties
Identify challenges and strengths of Indian democracy
Describe the powers and functions of the President

topics.title_en: The Parliament (Lok Sabha and Rajya Sabha)
objectives: Explain the structure and role of the Indian Parliament

topics.title_en: The Prime Minister and Council of Ministers
objectives: Understand the functions of the Prime Minister and Council of Ministers
Outline the composition and jurisdiction of the Supreme Court
Describe the role and powers of the Governor

topics.title_en: State Legislature (Vidhan Sabha and Vidhan Parishad)
objectives: Explain the structure and functions of state legislatures

topics.title_en: The Chief Minister and Council of Ministers
objectives: Understand the functions of the Chief Minister and Council of Ministers
Outline the composition and jurisdiction of High Courts
Explain the structure and functions of Panchayati Raj
Describe the working of urban local bodies
Analyze the significance of local self-government
Identify the core principles of Indian democracy
Explain Fundamental Rights and Duties
Understand the significance of Directive Principles
Describe the concept of Universal Adult Franchise

book_title_or: ସାମାଜିକ ବିଜ୍ଞାନ ଭାଗ- ୧: ଇତିହାସ ଓ ରାଜନୀତି ବିଜ୍ଞାନ
